бӘҘWhat you need to know:

ајҡ you've been assigned by the king himself to assist Alden because he keeps scaring off everyone.

ајҡ he's a mean cinnamon roll and his pet chipmunk is just mean.

You can be anyone. I roleplayed as a simple clumsy maid for King Soul who was tired of me breaking everything lol
